233.レストリア平野にある 遺跡を調査せよ。:
Explore the ruins in the Restoria
Plains.

262.シュタール鉱野で 空に浮かんだ\n珍しい色の結晶を調査せよ。:
Investigate the oddly-colored
crystals above Stahl Minefield.

305.ムニエカ地方で\nピンク色の蝶を調査せよ。:
Investigate the pink butterflies
in the Munieka region.

335.ウォルド地方にある 遺跡を調査せよ。:
Explore the ruins in the Angefall
region.

363.レストリア平野にある 巨石群を調査し\n適切な しぐさをせよ。:
Investigate the megalith in the
Restoria Plains and perform the
correct emote.

408.タービア草原にある大木の\n頂上からの景色を 調査し\n適切な しぐさをせよ。:
Examine the view from a large tree in
the Turbia Meadows and perform
the correct emote.

462.ムニエカ地方にある 崩れた橋を調査し\n適切な しぐさをせよ。:
Investigate the collapsed bridge in the
Munieka region and perform the
correct emote.

507.タービア草原にある 牧場を\n調査に向かった 調査員の行方を探せ。:
Search for the researcher who went
off to the ranch in the Turbia Meadows.

555.ラランブラ山道にある 古びた小屋の\n調査に向かった 調査員の行方を探せ。:
Search for the researcher who went
off to the old cabin on the Larambla
Trail.

609.ウォルド地方にある 崩れた塔の\n調査に向かった調査員に\n物資を補給せよ。:
Provide supplies to the investigators
at the collapsed tower in the
Angelfall region.

662.レストリア平野で\n一番遅いモンスターを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat the slowest monster in the
Restoria Plains once.

701.シュタール鉱野で\n一番生息数が少ないモンスターを\n１匹討伐せよ。:
Defeat the rarest monster that dwells
in the Stahl Minefield once.

748.タービア草原で\n一番生息数が多いモンスターを\n１匹討伐せよ。:
Defeat the most common monster that
dwells in the Turbia Meadows once.

792.ラランブラ山道で\n一番軽いモンスターを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat the monster that weighs the
least on the Larambla Trail once.

831.ムニエカ地方で\n一番素早いモンスターを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat the quickest monster in the
Munieka region once.

870.ウォルド地方で\n一番重いモンスターを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat the monster that weighs the
most in the Angelfall region once.

908.シュタール鉱野で\nモンスターを１２匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat 12 monsters in the Stahl
Minefield.

943.タービア草原で\nモンスターを１２匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat 12 monsters in the Turbia
Meadows.

976.ラランブラ山道で\nモンスターを１２匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat 12 monsters on the Larambla
Trail.

1011.ウォルド地方で\nモンスターを１２匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat 12 monsters in the Angelfall
region.

1044.レストリア平野で 深緑の豊かな尻尾を\n持つモンスターを１匹討伐せよ。:
Defeat a monster with a lush and deep
green tail in the Restoria Plains.

1095.シュタール鉱野で 反省会をする\nモンスターを１匹討伐せよ。:
Defeat a monster in a meeting in the
Stahl Minefield.

1138.ラランブラ山道で 天才を自認する\nモンスターを１匹討伐せよ。:
Defeat a monster that's a
self-proclaimed genius on the Larambla
Trail.

1183.ムニエカ地方で 冒険者を収穫する\nモンスターを１匹討伐せよ。:
Defeat a monster that "harvests"
adventurers in the Munieka region.

1228.ウォルド地方で 鳴き声が\n名前になったモンスターを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat a monster whose color matches
its attitude in the Angelfall region.

1292.レストリア平野の ラランブラ山道への\n入り口付近に 遺跡らしき建造物を\n見か:
I spotted what look to be ruins in the
Restoria Plains, near the Larambla
Trail. They may be crucial to Zeniath's
history, so I'd like you to
investigate.

1430.シュタール鉱野の ハディン採石場の\n入り口から 南東のあたりに\n珍しい色の結:
Southeast of the Hadine Quarry's
entrance are large, floating crystals
with unusual colors. They may be
remains of the Dia Kut, so I'd like
you to investigate them.

1574.ムニエカ地方の 東部の海岸線付近で\nピンク色の蝶の群れを 見かけましたが\nど:
I've spotted a swarm of pink
butterflies near the Munieka region's
eastern coastline. They appear to be
not native to Astoltia, so I'd like you
to investigate this possibly new
species.

1726.ウォルド地方の 南東の端の方に\n苔むした 相当に古そうな\n遺跡らしきものを:
In the Angellfall region's southeast
corner, I came across ancient, moss-
covered ruins. There appear to be
letters carved into them, so they
must have some historic significance.
Please investigate them.

1869.レストリア平野の シュタール鉱野への\n入り口から 北西のあたりに\n奇妙な巨石:
I discovered a megalith in the
southeastern Restoria Plains. It
clearly looks like some kind of man-
made altar. Please head there to
investigate further.

2019.タービア草原の 南東に\nテンシノコシカケと 呼ばれる\nキノコの生えた巨木が:
In the southeast Turbia Meadows is a
large tree that grows mushrooms called
Celestools. As the name suggests, go to
this tree and sit upon a mushroom to
survey the surrounding area.

2151.ムニエカ地方の 南西の海岸線付近に\n崩れてしまった橋が あるようです。\nゼニ:
There is a collapsed bridge near the
Munieka region's southwestern
coastline. To learn more about how
Zeniath's people might have once lived,
I would like you to investigate.

2303.タービア草原の風車の 南西にある牧場に\n向かった調査員から 物資補給依頼です。:
A researcher at the southwestern ranch
in the Turbia Meadows is requesting a
supply shipment. Please deliver one
<%sEV_ITEM> to him.
Why is he asking for sweets?

2437.ラランブラ山道の 北東の端に\n古びた小屋を 見かけたので\n調査員を派遣しまし:
I spotted an old cabin in the
northeastern end of the Larambla Trail.
I sent a researcher to investigate, but
he has not returned, so I'd like you
to go and search for him.
I pray that he is safe...

2557.ウォルド地方で 聖湖ゼニートの\n南西にある草原に 崩れた塔があります。\nそこ:
In the Angelfall region is a collapsed
tower southwest of Lake Zenit. The
researcher I had dispatched there is
requesting supplies. Please head there
and deliver one <%sEV_ITEM>.

2711.モンスターの 討伐をお願いします。\n足がないような モンスターは\nどうしても:
I need you to defeat a monster.
Those without legs give the
impression of moving rather slow.
Because of that, they'll defend
themselves with poison or shrinking
their enemies.

2843.モンスターの 討伐をお願いします。\n数は少ないですが それゆえに目立つ\nとも:
I need you to defeat a monster.
There may not be too many of them, but
that only causes them to stand out all
the more. They have a striking
coloration that can be seen from quite
far...

2943.モンスターの 討伐をお願いします。\nタービア草原では深紅色のコーンが\nよく採:
Please help me to defeat a monster.
I hear it's easy to find crimson-
colored corn in the Turbia Meadows.
I'd really like to try some myself.

3031.モンスターの 討伐をお願いします。\n一番軽いということなので\n身体が小さかっ:
Please help me to defeat a monster.
Apparently it's the lightest one, so I
have a feeling it's either small or it
flies. That gives me the impression
it may be a kind of insect...

3149.モンスターの 討伐をお願いします。\n見た目では 想像できないような\nモンスタ:
Please help me to defeat a monster.
Despite appearances, there are many
such cases where a monster is quicker
than originally thought! Sometimes
they may even dance, or cast spells!

3270.モンスターの 討伐をお願いします。\n身体の大きさや 攻撃の破壊力は\n重さに比:
Please help me to defeat a monster.
Its size and the power of its attacks
may be proportional to its weight!
At least, I think...

3350.モンスターの種類は問いませんので\n討伐を お願いします！:
The type of monster does not matter,
so please defeat any of them for me!

3392.深緑の豊かなしっぽを持つモンスターの\n討伐をお願いします。\n愛らしい見た目に:
I'd like you to defeat a monster that
has a lush, deep green tail. It may
look cute and harmless, but is one
of those monsters that hides a
dastardly demeanor.

3501.モンスターの 討伐をお願いします。\n反省会をするなら できるだけ多く\n人を集:
Please help me to defeat a monster.
If it's going to have a meeting, its
best to gather as many others as
possible, right?

3575.モンスターの 討伐をお願いします。\n賢さのバロメーターといえば\n呪文を 使い:
I need you to defeat a monster.
When it comes to mastering wisdom,
is it measured by a mastery of spells,
I wonder?

3647.モンスターの 討伐をお願いします。\n冒険者を 収穫するなんて、\nよほど 身体:
I need you to defeat a monster.
To "harvest" adventurers, this monster
must be quite big...or just very fond
of adventurers!

3733.鳴き声が 名前になったモンスターの\n討伐を お願いします。\nよほど 特徴的な:
I'd like you to defeat the monster
whose name comes from its color.
It must be quite angry if it's taken on
that color...

3943.レストリア平野にある ひときわ巨大な\nジア・クトの結晶を 調査せよ。:
Investigate the abnormally large Dia
Kut crystal in the Restoria Plains.

3994.シュタール鉱野の海面から突き出た\n未知の鉱物を 調査せよ。:
Investigate the unknown mineral that
protrudes from the sea in the Stahl
Minefield.

4037.ムニエカ地方にある ジア・クトによって\n結晶化された木を 調査せよ。:
Investigate the tree crystallized by
the Dia Kut in the Munieka region.

4088.雨の島近海に浮かぶ 虹色に輝く\n謎の流氷群を 調査せよ。:
Investigate the rainbow-colored drift
ice floating in the waters near Pluvi
Isle.

4130.雨の島の 中央付近にある干上がった\n湿地らしきものの跡地を 調査せよ。:
Investigate what appears to be a
dried-up wetland in the center of
Pluvi Isle.

4182.ガナン帝国領にある 湧き水の出る\n泉の水質を 調査せよ。:
Investigate the water quality of the
spring in the Gittish Empire.

4224.ラランブラ山道のメネト村付近に浮かぶ\n小さな孤島について 調査せよ。:
Investigate the small isolated island
nearby Menet Village.

4275.タービア草原にある 巨大な岩石によって\n塞がれた洞窟を 調査し\n適切な しぐ:
Investigate the cave blocked by the
large rocks in the Turbia Meadows
and perform the correct emote.

4338.ガナン帝国領にある 用途不明の\n祭壇らしきものを 調査し\n適切な しぐさをせ:
Investigate the strange altar structure
in the Gittish Empire and perform
the correct emote.

4397.ガナン帝国領の カデスの牢獄にある\n絞首台を 調査し\n適切な しぐさをせよ。:
Investigate the gallows of the Gortress
inside the Gittish Empire and
perform the correct emote.

4453.ラランブラ山道に棲息する\n一番レベルが高いまものを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat the highest level monster
on the Larambla Trail once.

4501.雨の島に棲息する\n一番お金持ちなまものを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat the wealthiest monster
on Pluvi Isle.

4542.ガナン帝国領に棲息する\n一番数が多いまものを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat one of the most numerous type
of monster in the Gittish Empire.

4586.ガナン帝国領に棲息する\n一番経験値が多いまものを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat one monster that yields the most
experience points in the Gittish
Empire.

4633.ムニエカ地方に棲息する\n眠りをあやつるまものを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat one monster that manipulates
sleep in the Munieka region.

4713.ガナン帝国領に棲息する\nモンスターを１２匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat 12 monsters in the Gittish
Empire.

4752.雨の島に棲息する\n口臭ケアをしているまものを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat one monster that keeps its teeth
clean on Pluvi Isle.

4796.雨の島に棲息する\n休む姿勢を模索しているまものを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat one monster that is searching
for the most comfortable way to rest
on Pluvi Isle.

4843.ガナン帝国領に棲息する\nオシャレ上級者のまものを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat one monster that is a true
master of style in the Gittish Empire.

4890.ガナン帝国領に棲息する\n料理人なまものを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat one monster that acts as a cook
in the Gittish Empire.

4931.ガナン帝国領に棲息する\nこころを持たないまものを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat one monster that's truly
heartless in the Gittish Empire.

4978.タービア草原に棲息する\n必殺技を持ったまものを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat one monster that possesses a
Special move in the Turbia Meadows.

5023.レストリア平野に棲息する\nイメチェンに成功したまものを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat one monster that has
successfully undergone a makeover
in the Restoria Plains.

5074.ウォルド地方に棲息する\nおへそが隠れているまものを１匹\n討伐せよ。:
Defeat one monster with a hidden navel
in the Angelfall region.

5122.レストリア平野の南東にある 高台に\nゼニアスの地で 最大級のジア・クトの\n結:
One of the largest Dia Kut crystals is
located in the southeastern Restoria
Plains. It's quite likely this was the
site of a massive attack, so I'd like
you to investigate the area.

5257.シュタール鉱野の 北東の断崖から見える\n海面から ジア・クトの遺した結晶に\n:
From Stahl Minefield's northeastern
cliffs, a distinct mineral can be seen
rising from the sea. I'd like you to
investigate whether this mineral comes
from the Dia Kut or is in fact
indigenous to that area.

5418.ムニエカ地方の西にある 結晶の森への\n入り口の 一番近くに生えている\n結晶化:
Near the Crystalline Forest west of
Munieka is a crystallized tree. As
these trees only exist in Zeniath due
to the Dia Kut, I'd like you to
investigate it for me.

5579.雨の島の 北東にある海面に\n虹色に輝く 不思議な流氷が\n多数 浮かんでいるよ:
Off the northeast coast of Pluvi Isle
are a multitude of rainbow-colored
ice floes. This appears to be a rare
phenomenon localized to this area
only, so I would like you to
investigate further.

5694.雨の島の中央付近にある 1か所だけ\n湿地が 干上がってしまったような場所の\n:
Within Pluvi Isle's center appears to
be a wetland completely dried up,
contrary to its surroundings with
pools of water. Please make your
way there to investigate.

5845.ゼニアスで発見された古き文献によると\nガナン帝国領の 南西の端に\n水量の豊か:
According to ancient texts, there
appears to be a spring located in the
southwestern Gittish Empire. As this
may have been a vital water source
for the region, I would like you to
investigate.

5991.ラランブラ山道にある メネト村付近の\n南東に 小さな孤島があるようです。\n陸:
There appears to be a small isolated
island southeast of Menet Village.
While it appears close to the
mainland, its true purpose is still
unknown. Please investigate it.

6123.タービア草原の 北東にある岩壁に\n岩石により 入り口がふさがれてしまった\n巨:
Along the rock face of the northern
Turbia Meadows is a cave blocked off
by fallen rocks. Reports claim that
voices can be hearing coming from
inside. Please make your way there
to investigate.

6275.ゼニアスで発見された古き文献によると\nガナン帝国領の 北東のほうに\n祭壇らし:
According to ancient texts, there is
what appears to be an altar in the
northeastern Gittish Empire. This
could very well help us to understand
their culture, so I ask that you make
your way there to investigate.

6422.ゼニアスで発見された古き文献によると\nガナン帝国領にある カデスの牢獄に\n絞:
According to ancient texts, a gallows
had been built inside the Gortress of
the Gittish Empire. It's said that the
voices of the resentful can be heard
if one is to approach... Please
confirm if this account is true.

6580.モンスターの討伐をお願いします。\n存在した年月の長さは レベルに\n反映される:
I need you to defeat a monster.
Would the sheer amount of time a
creature had existed not be reflected
in what level they are?

6652.モンスターの討伐をお願いします。\n王様のような見た目なら きっと\nお金をたく:
I need you to defeat a monster.
If it looks like royalty, then surely
it would carry lots of money?

6726.モンスターの討伐をお願いします。\nゾンビ系の魔物は 倒しても\n倒しても きり:
I need you to defeat a monster.
Undead family monsters give the
impression that there's simply no end
to them, regardless of how many you
defeat.

6794.モンスターの討伐をお願いします。\n数万年もの間 争うような種族は\nやはり 経:
I need you to defeat a monster.
A species that's been locked in
conflict for tens of thousands of
years... Surely, they must have lots
of experience, no?

6866.モンスターの討伐をお願いします。\n新種のキノコだと思って近づいた\n研究員が:
I need you to defeat a monster.
Thinking it was a new species of
mushroom, one of my researchers
approached itーonly to be put
to sleep.

6951.モンスターの討伐をお願いします。\nケアを しなければならないほど\n強烈なニオ:
I need you to defeat a monster.
Does it possess a skill with a smell
so powerful that one would need to
take extra precaution against it?

7034.モンスターの討伐をお願いします。\n休むなら 座るのがよさそうですが\n何か 座:
I need you to defeat a monster.
Sitting down to rest seems to be the
best course of action...is there some
reason it is not able to?

7112.モンスターの討伐をお願いします。\nオシャレ上級者というからには \nきっと コ:
I need you to defeat a monster.
If it truly is a fashion expert, then
surely it is particular even about
the accent colors in its outfit.

7209.モンスターの討伐をお願いします。\n腕がたくさんあれば\n複数の料理を 同時に作:
I need you to defeat a monster.
I find myself thinking sometimes...
If I just had a few more arms, then
I could easily cook multiple things at
a time.

7288.モンスターの討伐をお願いします。\n心がないということは 冷徹で 何事にも\n動:
I need you to defeat a monster.
To be heartless implies a being that
is cold, ruthless, and unshaken by
anything. One would do well not to
cross paths with such a being.

7395.モンスターの討伐をお願いします。\n自分の肉体を 最大限に活かしてこそ\n必殺の:
I need you to defeat a monster.
It is only when one's body is driven
to its absolute limit that a "Special
move" is truly special.

7469.モンスターの討伐をお願いします。\n自分のイメージは 変えにくいものですし\nた:
I need you to defeat a monster.
One's own image is difficult to
change. I also imagine it's quite
the hard worker.

7552.モンスターの討伐をお願いします。\n今のところ 報告されている魔物の中で\nおへ:
I need you to defeat a monster.
Among all the monsters that have been
reported so far, none of them should
have a navel...
